title: Discuss → James-mode web chat → brief-to-disk, linked, manual advance

tests.summary: 10 passed (buildDiscussUrl James-mode opaque context, briefSlug, isSafeBriefPath containment, recordBrief CAS-link + traversal reject, manual-advance contract)

build.summary: board UI rebuilt with the Discuss action

e2e.cmd: playwright headless render (board Discuss list + James-mode web chat)
e2e.summary: the board renders Discuss as the interactive 'web chat' dashed list with NO Start/Advance (manual Move only); buildDiscussUrl opens the web channel in James mode carrying the card as opaque context (rendered the James-mode surface). The brief-to-disk + card.briefPath link + manual-advance contract are the committed unit suite (10).

codexReview.notes: fixed briefPath containment, Start-rejects-interactive, UI hides Start/Advance for Discuss

codexPwTest.summary: codex sandbox cannot launch Chromium. Same-runtime Playwright render done; cross-model REVIEW (3A approve r2) is the second-model opinion.

by: vision review (board Discuss column + James-mode chat)
designAudit.notes: Discuss column rendered with the interactive/dashed treatment + 'web chat' label, no Start button; James-mode chat surface clean.

video.notes: board Discuss list render + the James-mode web chat the handoff opens; the brief-to-disk + link + manual-advance contract is the committed unit suite (10).

blockers.cause: a live James-mode Discuss conversation that actually writes a brief to disk requires the full gateway+operative stack (real claude TUI on the Max account) — not stood up in this autonomous headless run
blockers.remediationAttempted: verified the Discuss→James-URL handoff + recordBrief CAS-link + manual-advance + briefPath containment via the committed unit suite (10 tests); rendered the board Discuss list + the James-mode chat surface via Playwright. The live brief-writing is a documented deferral, not a defect.
